description: The histogram uses bins of wildly inconsistent widths (ranging from 2 percentage points to 25 percentage points) but displays them as equal-width bars, making it impossible to fairly compare across groups. The wider bins like "15-25" and "25-50" naturally accumulate far more countries, creating misleadingly tall bars that exaggerate the concentration of countries in those ranges while the narrow bins like "0-3" and "3-5" artificially suppress counts, distorting the true shape of the distribution.
